text: Connect podcast listening to OpenClaw — learn preferences and surface relevant episodes
notes:
Options to explore:
- Connect Spotify/Apple Podcasts via API or scraping
- Share your favourite podcasts and I will monitor for new episodes
- Use Whisper to transcribe episodes and extract key insights
- Daily digest: 3 relevant episodes based on your interests and what you are building
Start by: telling me your top 5 podcasts — I will monitor them without needing an API connection

text: Define pricing for Sonesse and Nth Layer
notes:
Sonesse pricing options to consider:
- Per API call (usage-based, developer-friendly)
- Per bot-minute in meeting (aligns to value)
- Monthly platform fee + usage
- Free tier for developers, paid for production
Nth Layer pricing:
- Day rate: £700-800/day (already set)
- Project-based retainer: £5-10k/month
- Outcome-based: % of value created
Bring both to discussion — I can model scenarios and benchmark against competitors

text: Build Command Centre dashboard tab — single view: goals, metrics, signals, pipeline, risks, blockers, weekly progress
notes:
Design proposal first, then build
Must include:
- Goal progress with sparklines
- Weekly metrics (signals, prospects, outreach, conversations, hours saved)
- Pipeline health (Nth Layer deals, Sonesse leads)
- Active blockers and risks (red/amber/green)
- Agent status (which are running, last ran, errors)
- Top 3 actions for today
- Content pipeline (tutorials written vs published)
- This weeks wins
Mix of: summary cards, progress bars, mini charts, risk indicators
Mobile friendly

text: Approve Apollo lead gen agent (9AM cron)
notes:
The proposed agent runs at 9am daily:
Searches Apollo for leads matching your ICP (PE-backed SaaS, 20-500 employees, no CPO)
Scores each lead by signal strength (hiring, funding, growth)
Adds top 10 to Pipedrive pipeline automatically
Sends you a Slack summary with names, companies, and LinkedIn links
Requires: Pipedrive API key + GoG reauth (for Slack delivery)
Reply 'approved' to confirm build

text: Community tracker: create Google Sheet and share ID
notes:
Go to sheets.google.com
Create new spreadsheet named: 'OpenClaw Community Tracker'
Add headers in row 1: Date | Platform | Thread Title | URL | Upvotes | Comments | Keywords | Sentiment
Copy the Sheet ID from the URL
Share with matthewdewstowe@gmail.com as Editor
Send me the Sheet ID — I'll configure the tracker agent

text: Update nthlayerbot.co.uk nameservers to Cloudflare
notes:
Log into your domain registrar (where nthlayerbot.co.uk is registered)
Find DNS / Nameserver settings
Replace current nameservers with Cloudflare nameservers:
  - asa.ns.cloudflare.com
  - chad.ns.cloudflare.com
Save changes (propagation takes up to 48h)
Dashboard will then be accessible at dashboard.nthlayerbot.co.uk

text: Connect Apple Health data and iPhone Reminders to OpenClaw
notes:
Options for Apple Health integration:
Option A: Export from iPhone — Health app → profile icon → Export All Health Data → send the ZIP
Option B: Use Apple Shortcuts to auto-export daily metrics (steps, HRV, sleep) to a webhook
Option C: Third-party app like Health Auto Export → sends to Google Sheets
Recommended: Option C — install Health Auto Export on iPhone, connect to Google Sheets, I then read the sheet daily
Let me know which option you prefer

text: Set up Whisper voice note transcription on WSL
notes:
Run in WSL: pip install openai-whisper
Test: whisper --version
Record a voice note and send via Slack
I'll transcribe it using Whisper and reply with the text

text: Share Pipedrive API key to enable pipeline tracker agent
notes:
Log into Pipedrive
Go to: Settings → Personal preferences → API
Copy the API key
Send it here — I'll add it to MEMORY.md and configure the pipeline tracker agent

text: Job agent test run — test once GoG Gmail is reauthed
notes:
First complete GoG Gmail reauth
Then run manually: cd /home/matthewdewstowe/.openclaw/workspace/jobs && node job-agent.js
Check output for errors
Check email inbox for the job report
If working: the daily cron at 8am will run it automatically every weekday

text: Welsh CPO gap Google Sheet — waiting on GoG reauth
notes:
First complete GoG Gmail reauth
Then tell me — I'll create the sheet automatically with:
Tab 1: 34 Welsh tech companies WITH product leadership (verified)
Tab 2: 22 companies with NO product leadership (your targets)
Each row includes company name, domain, description, LinkedIn verify link
I'll send you the sheet URL

text: Publish Tutorial #1 to sonesse.ai blog — Tavus + Teams integration
notes:
Open: /home/matthewdewstowe/.openclaw/workspace/sonesse-content/tutorial-01-tavus-teams.md
Copy the content
Log into sonesse.ai CMS
Create new post at URL: /blog/tavus-microsoft-teams-integration
Paste content and publish
Submit URL to Google Search Console for indexing

text: Restart gateway after requireMention=false change — systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway
notes:
Open WSL terminal
Run: systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway
Wait 5 seconds
Test: send a message to a Slack channel without @mentioning the bot
It should now respond without needing @OpenClaw

text: Andy Jones calendar invite — need his email address (Zoom call 8am tomorrow)
notes:
Get Andy's email address
GoG will be reauthed by then
Run: GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD=openclaw gog calendar create --title 'Catch-up with Andy Jones' --start tomorrow 08:00 --end tomorrow 08:30 --attendees ANDYS_EMAIL --zoom -a matthewdewstowe@gmail.com

text: LinkedIn automation — sign into LinkedIn in debug Chrome window so browser automation works
notes:
Open the debug Chrome window that launched earlier (it shows 'Sign in to Chrome')
Go to linkedin.com in that window
Sign in with your LinkedIn credentials
Once logged in, tell me — I'll then control Chrome to browse profiles, search contacts, and automate outreach

text: Reauth GoG Gmail — run: GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD=openclaw gog auth login -a matthewdewstowe@gmail.com
notes:
Open WSL terminal
Run: GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD=openclaw gog auth login -a matthewdewstowe@gmail.com
A browser window will open — sign in with Google
Approve access to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets
Confirm success: GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD=openclaw gog gmail search 'newer_than:1d' --max 1 -a matthewdewstowe@gmail.com

text: Share Pipedrive API key
notes:
Log into Pipedrive
Go to: Settings → Personal preferences → API
Copy the API key
Send it here — I'll add it to MEMORY.md and configure the pipeline tracker agent

text: Run wsl --shutdown in PowerShell to enable mirrored networking
notes:
Open Windows PowerShell (search 'PowerShell' in Windows Start menu — NOT WSL)
Type: wsl --shutdown
Press Enter
Wait 10 seconds
Reopen WSL by clicking Ubuntu in Start menu or running 'wsl' in PowerShell
Test networking: curl -s http://localhost:9222/json
If JSON appears = Chrome DevTools connected = LinkedIn automation ready

text: Approve community discussion tracker build (Reddit + HN + Brave → Sheets)
notes:
Review the proposed build: monitors Reddit (r/ProductManagement, r/AItools), Hacker News, and LinkedIn for relevant discussions
Agent runs daily, extracts threads with 10+ comments mentioning your ICP keywords
Outputs to a Google Sheet with thread URL, sentiment, engagement count
Reply 'approved' to confirm build
Provide a Google Sheet ID to store results

text: Create blank Google Sheet and share ID for community tracker
notes:
Go to sheets.google.com
Create a new blank spreadsheet
Name it: 'OpenClaw Community Tracker'
Click Share → Anyone with the link → Editor
Copy the Sheet ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit)
Send me the ID

text: Share Q1 goals (remaining beyond Sonesse leads + Nth Layer deal)
notes:
This is already done — Q1 goals are set in the dashboard:
10 hot leads for Sonesse
1 Nth Layer deal closed
Save £30k for deposit
No further action needed — task can be marked complete

text: Share your name and timezone for USER.md setup
notes:
This is already done — USER.md is set up with your name, timezone (Europe/London), location (Tenby/Cardiff), and profile
No further action needed — task can be marked complete

text: LinkedIn browser automation (pending WSL networking fix)
notes:
First complete: 'Run wsl --shutdown in PowerShell' task above
Then test: curl -s http://localhost:9222/json from WSL
If Chrome DevTools responds = LinkedIn automation is ready
I can then: search profiles, extract contact info, send connection requests, monitor activity
Note: LinkedIn has anti-bot detection — automation runs slowly and mimics human behaviour

text: Rotate Google OAuth client secret (shared over WhatsApp)
notes:
Go to: console.cloud.google.com
Select your OpenClaw project
Go to APIs & Services → Credentials
Find your OAuth 2.0 Client ID
Click Edit → Rotate secret
Copy the new secret
Update in OpenClaw config: replace 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 with new value
Run: openclaw gateway restart
